prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(detect_failure client_alpha)
(allocate_backoff_slot client_alpha backoff_slot_1)
(bind_error_signature client_alpha error_signature_1)
(finalize_diagnosis client_alpha error_signature_1)
(assign_test_asset_to_client client_alpha backoff_policy_alpha test_asset_1)
(unbind_error_signature client_alpha error_signature_1)
(detect_failure server_alpha)

(bind_error_signature server_alpha error_signature_1)

(assign_operator server_alpha operator_1)
(mark_strategy_evaluated server_alpha retry_strategy_alpha error_signature_1)
(operator_triage_server server_alpha retry_strategy_alpha operator_1)
(assemble_fix_bundle_with_test_variant client_alpha server_alpha backoff_policy_alpha retry_strategy_alpha fix_bundle_1)
(unbind_error_signature server_alpha error_signature_1)
(bind_error_signature client_alpha error_signature_1)
(trigger_ci_for_bundle fix_bundle_1 client_alpha error_signature_1)
(process_client_test_result client_alpha backoff_policy_alpha error_signature_1 test_asset_1)
(apply_fix_to_client client_alpha fix_bundle_1)
(apply_fix_to_server server_alpha fix_bundle_1)
(record_reset_with_deployment_marker client_alpha deployment_marker_1 error_signature_1)
(propagate_reset_and_release_backoff_slot client_alpha backoff_slot_1 deployment_marker_1)
(unbind_error_signature client_alpha error_signature_1)
(bind_error_signature server_alpha error_signature_1)
(record_reset_with_deployment_marker server_alpha deployment_marker_1 error_signature_1)
(propagate_reset_and_release_backoff_slot_server server_alpha backoff_slot_2 deployment_marker_1)
(unbind_error_signature server_alpha error_signature_1)
(unassign_operator server_alpha operator_1)
(detect_failure repair_work_item_1)
(allocate_backoff_slot repair_work_item_1 backoff_slot_1)
(bind_error_signature repair_work_item_1 error_signature_1)
(finalize_diagnosis repair_work_item_1 error_signature_1)
(bind_test_suite_to_work_item repair_work_item_1 test_suite_regression fix_bundle_1)
(assign_module_to_work_item repair_work_item_1 code_module_logging)
(instrument_work_item repair_work_item_1 test_suite_regression fix_bundle_1 error_signature_1 code_module_logging)
(assign_ci_job repair_work_item_1 ci_job_1)
(assign_operator repair_work_item_1 operator_1)
(enqueue_ci_job_for_work_item repair_work_item_1 ci_job_1 operator_1 test_suite_regression fix_bundle_1)
(assign_release_candidate repair_work_item_1 release_candidate_1)
(record_ci_success_with_review repair_work_item_1 release_candidate_1 test_suite_regression fix_bundle_1)
(assign_reviewer_to_work_item repair_work_item_1 reviewer_1)
(approve_work_item_review repair_work_item_1 client_alpha server_alpha error_signature_1 reviewer_1)
(finalize_work_item_post_review repair_work_item_1)
(record_reset_with_deployment_marker repair_work_item_1 deployment_marker_1 error_signature_1)
(propagate_reset_and_release_backoff_slot_for_work_item repair_work_item_1 backoff_slot_1 deployment_marker_1)
(unbind_error_signature repair_work_item_1 error_signature_1)
(unassign_ci_job repair_work_item_1 ci_job_1)
(unassign_release_candidate repair_work_item_1 release_candidate_1)
(unassign_operator repair_work_item_1 operator_1)
(detect_failure repair_work_item_2)
(allocate_backoff_slot repair_work_item_2 backoff_slot_2)
(bind_error_signature repair_work_item_2 error_signature_1)
(finalize_diagnosis repair_work_item_2 error_signature_1)
(bind_test_suite_to_work_item repair_work_item_2 test_suite_smoke fix_bundle_1)
(assign_module_to_work_item repair_work_item_2 code_module_backoff)
(instrument_work_item repair_work_item_2 test_suite_smoke fix_bundle_1 error_signature_1 code_module_backoff)
(assign_ci_job repair_work_item_2 ci_job_1)
(assign_operator repair_work_item_2 operator_1)
(enqueue_ci_job_for_work_item repair_work_item_2 ci_job_1 operator_1 test_suite_smoke fix_bundle_1)
(assign_release_candidate repair_work_item_2 release_candidate_1)
(record_ci_success_with_review repair_work_item_2 release_candidate_1 test_suite_smoke fix_bundle_1)
(assign_reviewer_to_work_item repair_work_item_2 reviewer_2)
(approve_work_item_review repair_work_item_2 client_alpha server_alpha error_signature_1 reviewer_2)
(finalize_work_item_post_review repair_work_item_2)
(record_reset_with_deployment_marker repair_work_item_2 deployment_marker_1 error_signature_1)
(propagate_reset_and_release_backoff_slot_for_work_item repair_work_item_2 backoff_slot_2 deployment_marker_1)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a complex planning domain for handling failures in client and server components with repair work items. The goal is to achieve reset_completed for client_alpha, server_alpha, repair_work_item_1, and repair_work_item_2.


## Investigating Problem Details  
- The task centers on a planning domain for managing failures in client and server components.  
- It involves handling repair work items to achieve reset_completed for client_alpha, server_alpha, repair_work_item_1, and repair_work_item_2.

## Investigating Problem Details  
- Repair work items (repair_work_item_1, repair_work_item_2) are classified as system components, alongside client_alpha and server_alpha.  
- To achieve reset_completed, each component must undergo a sequence: detect_failure, allocate_backoff_slot, bind_error_signature, and finalize_diagnosis.  

## Examining Reset Process  
- Reset_completed is achieved via propagate_reset_and_release_backoff_slot, requiring reset_recorded from record_reset_with_deployment_marker, which needs finalized status.  
- Finalized status for clients/servers comes from apply_fix_to_*, needing ready_for_fix, marked_for_fix, fix_bundle_staged, and ci_triggered; for work items, it’s from finalize_work_item_* actions after ci_passed.  

## Analyzing Component Differences  
- Clients and servers have specific predicates like client_ready_for_fix and server_marked_for_fix, but repair work items lack these, as they aren’t client or server components.  
- Work items rely on finalize_work_item_* actions for finalized status, with prerequisites like work_item_ci_scheduled and work_item_ci_prepared, distinct from client/server paths.

## Exploring Resource Constraints  
- Only one error signature, operator, test asset, CI job, and deployment marker are available, limiting parallel processing.  
- Three backoff slots and one fix bundle are provided, requiring careful allocation for client_alpha, server_alpha, repair_work_item_1, and repair_work_item_2.  

## Examining Diagnosis Requirements  
- All four components (client_alpha, server_alpha, repair_work_item_1, repair_work_item_2) need diagnosis, including error binding, to proceed.  
- Work items require actions like claim_stakeholder_for_work_item and stage_work_item_ci, both needing error_bound_to_entity, similar to client/server components.  

## Analyzing Fix Bundle Assembly  
- Assembling a fix bundle requires both client and server to be ready_for_fix, with variants allowing different evaluation and marking conditions.  
- Variants include options like policy_test_requested or strategy_test_requested, but still necessitate ready_for_fix set by operator triage or test asset assignment.

## Planning Diagnosis Sequence  
- To diagnose components, start with detecting failure for client_alpha, allocating backoff_slot_1, binding error_signature_1, and finalizing diagnosis.  
- For server_alpha, error_signature must be unbound from client_alpha first, allowing detection, allocation of backoff_slot_2, binding, and finalizing diagnosis.  

## Evaluating Readiness Paths  
- Use test path for client_alpha by assigning test_asset_1, setting policy_test_requested and client_ready_for_fix, but not marked_for_fix.  
- For server_alpha, consider operator path after diagnosis, as test_asset is bound to client_alpha and unavailable.  

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- Unbinding error_signature_1 from client_alpha is necessary to diagnose server_alpha, ensuring error_signature availability.  
- Operator_1 can be assigned to server_alpha for strategy evaluation and triage, requiring diagnosed status and operator availability.

## Managing Fix Application  
- Process client test results for client_alpha with backoff_policy_alpha, error_signature_1, and test_asset_1, setting policy evaluated and client_marked_for_fix, freeing test_asset.  
- Apply fix bundle fb1 to client_alpha and server_alpha, both finalized after meeting preconditions like ready_for_fix, marked_for_fix, staged, and CI triggered.  

## Executing Reset Process  
- Record reset for client_alpha using deployment_marker_1 and error_signature_1, setting reset_recorded and binding deployment marker, with error still bound to client.  
- Propagate reset for client_alpha, releasing backoff_slot_1 and deployment_marker_1, achieving reset_completed, while error remains bound.  

## Handling Server Reset  
- Unbind error_signature_1 from client_alpha to free it, then bind to server_alpha for reset recording, ensuring error_bound requirement is met.  
- Record and propagate reset for server_alpha, releasing backoff_slot_2 and deployment_marker_1, achieving reset_completed, with error still bound post-propagate.  

## Preparing Work Item Diagnosis  
- Diagnose repair_work_item_1 by detecting failure, allocating available backoff_slot_1, but error_signature_1 is bound to server_alpha, requiring unbinding.  
- Unbind error_signature_1 from server_alpha to make it available for binding to repair_work_item_1, ensuring diagnosis can proceed.

## Managing CI and Review Processes  
- Assign release_candidate_1 to repair_work_item_1 (rwi1) after diagnosis, marking it associated and unavailable.  
- Record CI success with review for rwi1, requiring scheduled CI, association with release candidate, and specific flag conditions (flag_a true, flag_b false), setting CI passed and review required.  
- Assign reviewer_1 to rwi1 for review, ensuring reviewer availability and review requirement, then mark review approved after validation.  
- Finalize rwi1 post-review, closing it after CI passed and review approved, keeping error bound to rwi1.  

## Handling Stakeholder Engagement  
- Claim stakeholder_product for rwi1, requiring diagnosis and error binding, setting stakeholder acknowledgement and marking stakeholder unavailable.  
- Acknowledge stakeholder claim for rwi1 by operator_1, ensuring operator assignment, setting operator acknowledgement for triage completion.  

## Executing Work Item Reset  
- Record reset for finalized rwi1 using deployment_marker_1 and error_signature_1, binding deployment and making it unavailable.  
- Propagate reset for rwi1, releasing backoff_slot_1 and deployment_marker_1, achieving reset completion, with error still bound initially.  

## Preparing for Next Work Item  
- Unbind error_signature_1 from rwi1 after reset to make it available for repair_work_item_2 (rwi2), ensuring resource reusability.  
- Detect failure for rwi2, planning to allocate available backoff_slot_3 for variety, with all slots currently available post-propagation.

## Sequencing Work Item Processes  
- Detect failure for client_alpha, allocate backoff_slot_1, and bind error_signature_1 for diagnosis.  
- Finalize diagnosis for client_alpha, then unbind error_signature_1 to diagnose server_alpha, ensuring sequential resource availability.  

## Managing Error Binding and Diagnosis  
- Bind error_signature_1 to server_alpha after unbinding from client_alpha, then finalize diagnosis for server_alpha.  
- Assign operator_1 and evaluate retry_strategy_alpha for server_alpha, marking it ready for fixes.  

## Assembling and Applying Fixes  
- Assemble fix_bundle_1 using client_alpha, server_alpha, backoff_policy_alpha, and retry_strategy_alpha, staging it for application.  
- Unbind error_signature_1 from server_alpha, rebind to client_alpha, and trigger CI for fix_bundle_1, ensuring proper error association.  

## Finalizing and Resetting Systems  
- Process client test results, marking client_alpha fixed and releasing test_asset_1, completing policy evaluation.  
- Apply fixes to both client_alpha and server_alpha, then record reset for client_alpha using deployment_marker_1, finalizing the process.

## Reviewing Work Item Completion  
- Finalize repair_work_item_2 post-review, marking it complete with reviewer_2 and error_signature_1.  
- Record reset for repair_work_item_2 using deployment_marker_1, ensuring error_signature_1 is properly linked.  

## Managing Resource Release  
- Propagate reset for repair_work_item_2, releasing backoff_slot_2 and deployment_marker_1 for reuse.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
